arts.ttl: Liam Delap issues transfer update as Chelsea eye HUGE summer deal
arts.sum: Liam Delap has insisted that he remains happy at Ipswich Town, despite significant transfer interest from Chelsea . Chelsea, however, are currently leading the race for his signature and Enzo Maresca’s side are expected to ramp up negotiations for Delap shortly as they look to sign a new centre forward this summer.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Chelsea: Kick-off time, TV channel, stream details and team news
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has rounded up everything you need to know about Chelsea's clash against Brighton. Enzo Maresca will be eager to exact his revenge on Fabian Hürzeler after Brighton dumped Chelsea out of the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: Jorgensen is Chelsea's first-choice keeper - Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca says Filip Jorgensen is his first-choice goalkeeper and confirms forward Nicolas Jackson is out for up to eight weeks.

arts.ttl: Wesley Fofana two-word injury update prompts Chelsea response after Enzo Maresca comments
arts.sum: Given Maresca's update, Fofana is likely come back to action at the end of this month or beginning of March. Now his injury nightmare could soon be coming to an end as he works his way back to full fitness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to MISS OUT on €100m target due to trophy drought
arts.sum: The 21-year-old is reportedly desperate to stay at Camp Nou and he dreams of winning major trophies with the club, including the Champions League and La Liga. Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado is set to snub transfer interest from Chelsea in order to remain at Camp Nou for the foreseeable future, according to reports in Spain.
